verses.text: 'He that dwelleth in the secret place of the most High shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty,' calling Him 'my refuge and my fortress.' Closeness to God is safety. The soul that makes God its home rests under His sheltering care.

'He that dwelleth in the secret place of the most High shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty,' calling Him 'my refuge and my fortress.' Closeness to God is safety. The soul that makes God its home rests under His sheltering care.

God delivers from the hunter's snare and deadly plague, covering with His feathers so one need not fear 'the terror by night' nor the arrow by day. His protection is constant. Day and night the believer is under the wing of God.

God delivers from the hunter's snare and deadly plague, covering with His feathers so one need not fear 'the terror by night' nor the arrow by day. His protection is constant. Day and night the believer is under the wing of God.

God delivers from the hunter's snare and deadly plague, covering with His feathers so one need not fear 'the terror by night' nor the arrow by day. His protection is constant. Day and night the believer is under the wing of God.

God delivers from the hunter's snare and deadly plague, covering with His feathers so one need not fear 'the terror by night' nor the arrow by day. His protection is constant. Day and night the believer is under the wing of God.

Though thousands fall around, it shall not come near the one who trusts; he shall only behold the reward of the wicked. God shields His own amid widespread ruin. Faith may stand secure where many perish.

Though thousands fall around, it shall not come near the one who trusts; he shall only behold the reward of the wicked. God shields His own amid widespread ruin. Faith may stand secure where many perish.

Because he has made the LORD his habitation, no real evil shall befall him nor plague come near his dwelling. God's home-dwellers are safe. What touches them is filtered through a Father's loving hand.

Because he has made the LORD his habitation, no real evil shall befall him nor plague come near his dwelling. God's home-dwellers are safe. What touches them is filtered through a Father's loving hand.

God gives His angels charge to keep him in all his ways, bearing him up so he treads on lion and serpent. Heaven's hosts guard the godly. Satan misused this promise against Christ, but it stands sure for those who truly trust God.

God gives His angels charge to keep him in all his ways, bearing him up so he treads on lion and serpent. Heaven's hosts guard the godly. Satan misused this promise against Christ, but it stands sure for those who truly trust God.

God Himself speaks: because he has set his love on Me, 'I will deliver him... I will set him on high,' answer, honour, and satisfy him with long life and salvation. Love is met with love. The God we cling to pledges Himself wholly to our good.
